command.ehpc.cluster.list.description: List E-HPC clusters in a region.
command.ehpc.cluster.show.description: Show details of an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.cluster.type.list.descripti: List E-HPC cluster types in a region.
command.ehpc.image.base.list.description: List E-HPC base images for a bare-metal specification.
command.ehpc.image.list.description: List E-HPC images in a region.
command.ehpc.node.add.batch.description: Add one or more compute nodes to an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.node.create.description: Create a node in an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.node.delete.batch.descripti: Delete one or more nodes from an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.node.delete.description: Delete a node from an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.node.list.description: List nodes in an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.node.reboot.batch.descripti: Reboot one or more nodes in an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.node.show.description: Show details of a node in an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.node.start.batch.descriptio: Start one or more nodes in an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.node.stop.batch.description: Stop one or more nodes in an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.queue.list.description: List queues in an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.scheduler.show.description: Show scheduler information for an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.user.add.batch.description: Add one or more users to an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.user.delete.batch.descripti: Delete one or more users from an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.user.list.description: List users in an E-HPC cluster.
command.ehpc.user.passwords.update.descr: Update passwords for one or more cluster users.
name: Elastic High Performance Computing
parameter.ehpc.cluster.create.cluster_na: Cluster name; 2-20 characters using only letters, digits, and hyphens; must start with a letter and must not end with a hyphen
parameter.ehpc.cluster.create.cluster_ty: Cluster type UUID; currently must be ct-jn8sm0bejygcdglhpljbddjll9ro
parameter.ehpc.cluster.create.subnet_uui: Subnet UUID; must belong to the selected VPC and corresponds to subnetID in the subnet APIs
parameter.ehpc.cluster.create.vpc_uuid.d: VPC UUID; corresponds to vpcID in the VPC APIs
parameter.ehpc.cluster.list.cluster_name: Comma-separated cluster names; intersects with --cluster-uuid-list when both are set
parameter.ehpc.cluster.list.cluster_uuid: Comma-separated cluster UUIDs; intersects with --cluster-name-list when both are set
parameter.ehpc.cluster.list.page_no.desc: Page number; integer greater than or equal to 1
parameter.ehpc.cluster.list.page_size.de: Records per page in the range [1, 1000]
parameter.ehpc.image.list.node_role.desc: Node role: 0 for master or 1 for compute
parameter.ehpc.image.list.node_type.desc: Node type; currently only 0 for bm bare metal is supported
parameter.ehpc.node.add.batch.node_name_: JSON array of at most 99 node names; each name must equal instanceName for a server in the bare-metal order
parameter.ehpc.node.add.batch.node_order: Completed bare-metal server order ID; the server must use the cluster VPC and an E-HPC image
Node type; currently only 0 for bm bare metal is supported
parameter.ehpc.node.create.node_name.des: Node name; must equal the instanceName of the backing bare-metal server
parameter.ehpc.node.create.node_order_id: Completed bare-metal server order ID; the server must use the cluster VPC and an E-HPC image
parameter.ehpc.node.create.node_role.des: Node role: 0 for master or 1 for compute
parameter.ehpc.node.create.node_type.des: Node type; currently only 0 for bm bare metal is supported
JSON array of at most 99 node names; each name must equal instanceName for a server in the bare-metal order
parameter.ehpc.node.list.page_no.descrip: Page number; integer greater than or equal to 1
parameter.ehpc.node.list.page_size.descr: Records per page in the range [1, 1000]
JSON array of [1, 100] users; each object requires userName and password; userName must be 1-30 lowercase letters, digits, or underscores and start with a lowercase letter; password must be 8-26 characters and contain a letter, a digit, and a special character from ~!@#$%^*_-+{[]}:,.?/
parameter.ehpc.user.delete.batch.user_li: JSON array of [1, 100] users; each object requires userUUID and Boolean isHomeReserved, where true preserves the home directory and false does not
parameter.ehpc.user.list.page_no.descrip: Page number; integer greater than or equal to 1
parameter.ehpc.user.list.page_size.descr: Records per page in the range [1, 1000]
Comma-separated user names; intersects with --user-uuid-list when both are set
Comma-separated user UUIDs; intersects with --user-name-list when both are set
parameter.ehpc.user.passwords.update.use: JSON array of [1, 100] users; each object requires userUUID and password; password must be 8-26 characters and contain a letter, a digit, and a special character from ~!@#$%^*_-+{[]}:,.?/
